case_title: LEE YUK SUN VS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MUN. RAILWAY

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE YUK SUN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MUN. RAILWAY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
